ItacPersonItem.Notes: Founder of the Accademia degli Infiammati Academy. Varchi greeted him as such in `Lezione sesta sopra il primo canto del Paradiso di Dante`, which he delivered in the Accademia Fiorentina (June 1545). On Orsini and the Infiammati, see Flamini, `Il canzoniere inedito di Leone Orsini`, in Raccolta di studi critici dedicata ad Alessandro D`Ancona (Florence, 1901). For his place in the Accademia dello Sdegno, see Premoli (2005)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
